# Data statistics

```{r load_data_stats}
load("resources/data.Rdata")
```

```{r}
seq <- read_counts %>% 
  column_to_rownames(., "genome") %>% 
  colSums() %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename(seq=".") %>% 
  arrange(seq)
```

## Sample overview 

```{r}
sample_metadata %>% 
  nrow()
```

```{r}
sample_metadata %>% 
  group_by(country) %>% 
  summarise(count=n())
```

```{r}
sample_metadata %>% 
  group_by(dog_type) %>% 
  summarise(count=n())
```
